title: Golisoda
subTitle: Four orphans living in the City Market in Bengaluru decide to make a name for themselves by opening a restaurant. However, things get out of control when some goons decide to wreak havoc.

title: Manetana
subTitle: Ananda Bhairavi embarks on a mission to find the perfect daughter-in-law who shares the same values as her. However, this creates tensions in her family.

title: Sumangali
subTitle: Deepa is a girl with a broken marriage and also the sole earner of her family. Moreover, her brother-in-law is the culprit behind her troubles.

title: Aaradhane
subTitle: A religious leader performs sacred rituals and worships the idol of a Hindu deity while chanting holy hymns to seek divine blessings.

title: Maharshi Vaani
subTitle: Shri Maharishi Ananda Guruji explores the spiritual side of the human race. He also renders solutions to the queries raised by the callers.

title: Karna
subTitle: A talented male gynaecologist defies gender roles like balancing household chores and family duties, while standing strong against a patriarchal father and scheming relatives.

title: Naa Ninna Bidalarre
subTitle: Ambika dies due to Maya's schemes, but as a spirit, she guards her daughter Hita. Later, she seeks help from her long-lost sister, Durga, to protect Hita from Maya's malice.

title: Annayya
subTitle: Shivanna, an elder brother, nurtures his four sisters, undertaking the responsibility of getting them married. However, he realises that marriage is not their only life goal.

title: Adi lakashmi Purana
subTitle: Lakshmi leaves her small town for a new life in the city, clashing with Adi’s ridicule at every turn; destiny forces them into marriage, beginning a story neither saw coming.

title: Lakshmi Nivasa
subTitle: Lakshmi and Srinivas, a middle-class couple, save money to fulfill their dreams, but their children have a different agenda for themselves.

title: Brahmagantu
subTitle: When her sister elopes with her lover before the wedding, a reluctant Deepa is forced to marry the groom instead. However, due to her ordinary looks, her in-laws are far from welcoming.

title: Amruthadhaare
subTitle: Goutham, a successful entrepreneur, enters a union of mutual benefit with Bhoomika, a brilliant woman who is almost ten years younger than him.

title: Meghasandesha
subTitle: Gagan and Bhoomi lose their connection with their respective fathers at a young age. While Gagan is unable to forget his father's betrayal, Bhoomi hopes to find her roots someday.

title: Sose Thanda Soubhagya
subTitle: Sose Thanda Soubhagya

title: Hrudaya Geetha
subTitle: Radha, a caring teacher, finds herself the unexpected protector of Krishna, a young man living with the mind of a child after a life-changing accident.

title: Annapoorna
subTitle: When Srikar is forced to marry Avani, his mother Vedavathi is upset, as she wanted a daughter-in-law with a specific horoscope who will become her successor and lift the village from Goddess Annapurna's curse.

title: Mane Aliya
subTitle: A determined spouse opposes his arrogant partner to dismantle her vanity and restore his parent's vanished prestige. This courageous act sparks a fierce struggle involving self-respect, influence, and ultimate salvation.

subTitle: A tragedy leads Sandhya's daughter Maya to her estranged aunt Janaki's home. However, Janaki grows concerned as Maya's modern outlook influences her own daughter.
